description: kapi-check ML checker — runs a small, open, multilingual sentence-embedding ONNX model in-process and speaks a line-delimited JSON protocol on stdin/stdout. Backs the voice/style-similarity and register checks; the deterministic checks need no model.
author: Neokapi <hello@neokapi.dev>

commands.name: check-ml
commands.long: List the embedding models the checker supports and whether they are installed. The model is acquired explicitly with `kapi-check pull`; the host check engine drives the plugin over the stdin/stdout protocol (kapi-check serve).
